raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee neſſe to Schkirstu
un to Sa-eefchanas Telti aug-
scham lihds ar wiſſeem twehteem
Rihkeem/ kas Telti bija/ tohs
neſſe tee Preestexi un Lewitti aug-
fcham.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet tas Kehninsch Sala-
mans/ un wiſta Israëta Drau-
dsiba/ kas preeſſch ta Schkirsta
pee winna bij fapulzejſchees/ up-
pureja Awis un Wehrichus/ fo
leela Pulka pehz nedß ſkaitiht
nedß lihdsinaht warreja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee Preestexi neſſe ta
KUNGU Derribas Schkirstu
fawa Weeta/ us to Deewa Run-
naschanas Weetas Nammu/
eekſch tahß wiſſwehtakas Wee-
tas appakſch to Kerubimu
Spahrneem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo tee Kerubimi iſplehte
fatwis Spahrnus pahr taSchkir-
ſta Weetu/ un tee Kerubimi ap-
flahje to Schkirstu/ un winna
Rahrtis pa Wirfu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tahß neſſainas Rahrtis
bija tik garraß/ ka to Kahrfchu
Galwas no ta Schkirsta preeſſch
tahs Runnaschanas Weetas re-
dsetas tappe/ bet Ahrapuffē tahs
ne tappe redsetas/ un tahß bija
tur lihds ſchodeen.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Gekſch ta Schkirsta ne bi-
ja neneeka/ ka ween tee diwi Gal-
di/ fo Mohsus Oreba btj eelizzis/
kur tas KUNGS weenu Derri-
bu darrija ar Israëta Behrneem/
kad tee no Egiptes-Settnnes bij
iſgahjuſchi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Rad tee Preestexi no tahß
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee Lewiti/ ar wiſſeen
teem/ kas femm Affawu/ un Ee-
mann/ un Jeditunu/ un win-
Behrneem un Brahkeem bija-
dseedaja ar linnu Drehbehn ap-
gehrbti ar Pulkſtenifscheem/ m
Sohma-Stabulehm/ un Koh-
lehm/ un stahweja prett ta Al-
ra Rihtapuffi/ un ar teem pe-
ſimts un diwideſimts Preeste-
reem/ tee puhte ar Trumme-
tehm.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kad tee weena Skan-
xa puhte un dseedaja/ tad tas bi-
ja itt ka weena weeniga Balfs-
kas to KUNGU teize un flaweja-
Rad tee nu to Balſi pazehle a-
Trumnetehm un Pulkſtenifscheem-
un zitteem spehſejameem Rth-
keem to KUNGU flaweht/ fo-
winsch labs un winna Schehla-
stiba muhschigi paleek/ tad tap-
pe tas pats Nams/ ta KUNGU
Nams ar weenu Badebbeft pee-
pildihts/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ka tee Preestexi ue twa-
reja stahweht tahß Padebbe-
pehz/ un kalpoht/ jo ta KUNGU
Gohdiba bij to Deewa Nammu-
peepildijft.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
